arts.ttl: Hollywood star Will Ferrell in Elland Road stands as Leeds host Burnley
arts.sum: Ferrell, 57, bought a minority stake in Leeds back in May.

arts.ttl: Minority shareholder Will Ferrell pictured with Leeds United chief Paraag Marathe at Elland Road
arts.sum: It was all smiles in Leeds United's director's box ahead of today's clash with Burnley as Will Ferrell attended his first match since becoming a minority shareholder in the Championship club. Ferrell, who was seen filming the Elland Road South Stand belting out Marching On Together, is understood to have invested in United earlier this year.

arts.ttl: 25 images of Burnley fans arriving at Elland for Championship fixture against Leeds United
arts.sum: Burnley fans have arrived at Elland Road for the Championship fixture against Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Roberts and Foster out: How Burnley line-up for Leeds United test as debut handed out
arts.sum: Burnley are without Connor Roberts and Lyle Foster for this lunchtime’s clash against promotion rivals Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Will Ferrell Leeds investment explained, net worth, Farke 'happy', Wrexham visit
arts.sum: Will Ferrell is set to attend his first Leeds United match as a minority investor when Burnley visit Elland Road this weekend. The 57-year-old has previously attended multiple Wrexham matches alongside their Hollywood owners Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney.

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news for Burnley as Farke makes Aaronson call and loses key striker
arts.sum: Leeds United: Illan Meslier; Jayden Bogle, Joe Rodon, Pascal Struijk, Junior Firpo; Ethan Ampadu, Ilia Gruev; Wilfried Gnonto, Brenden Aaronson, Manor Solomon; Mateo Joseph. By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Patrick Bamford Left Out of Leeds Squad v Burnley
arts.sum: Patrick Bamford has been left out of the Leeds squad to face Burnley at Elland Road on Saturday, despite being passed fit by Daniel Farke.

arts.ttl: Will Ferrell expected to attend first Leeds United match since becoming shareholder vs Burnley
arts.sum: Hollywood superstar Will Ferrell is expected to attend his first Leeds United match since becoming a minority shareholder today. Ferrell is among a raft of celebrities and sports stars who have invested in the Whites as part of the 49ers Enterprises vehicle.

arts.ttl: Leeds United could be about to get key appointment message from Daniel Farke
arts.sum: The last time Leeds United began a league season with a five-match unbeaten run they were starting out on their long road to the Championship title. They have each won promotion from the second tier on two occasions, though Farke has two titles and Parker went up via the play-offs and as runners-up.

arts.ttl: Leeds United minority owners Red Bull's future plans analysed after Everton and Newcastle deals
arts.sum: “It is viewed in 197 different countries and it could be that Red Bull has assessed this and concluded that English football, whether with Leeds in the Championship or Everton and Newcastle in the Premier League, is so important that it has to be in the market if it wants to get is product into the mindsets of consumers.“ Some eyebrows were raised over Red Bull, Leeds United's minority shareholders, adding Premier League clubs Newcastle United and Everton to the list of clubs they are commercially affiliated to.
